creator: denisehg@hotpop.com
text:
Thomas Abthorpe <tabthorpe@freebsd.org> writes:

> I am just confirming that you indeed want all files/patch-* removed from this 
> port.
>
> Please read, 
> http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/contrib-how.html, 
> it is easier to read a change request that is submitted as a unified diff.
>
> Thomas
>
> -- 
> Thomas Abthorpe		| FreeBSD Ports Committer
> tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org	| http://people.freebsd.org/~tabthorpe

`mg-20070918' source has already included those changes concerning
portability on FreeBSD.

And those patches do not apply cleanly if applied to `mg-20070918'.
Futher more, `mg-20070918' compiles well without any pathces on my
6.2-STABLE amd64. But I don't know if it will compile well on other
platforms.


-- 
And God spake unto Moses, and said unto him, I am the LORD:
		-- Exodus 6:2
